heading: Transfer of appropriations for management personnel and miscellaneous restaurant expenses to special deposit account
label: 2050 Transfer of appropriations for management personnel and miscellaneous restaurant expenses to special deposit account
text: Appropriations under this heading for management personnel and miscellaneous restaurant expenses on and after , shall be transferred at the beginning of each fiscal year to the special deposit account in the United States Treasury established under , and effective , all management personnel of the Senate Restaurant facilities shall be paid from the special deposit account. Management personnel transferred hereunder shall be paid at the same rates of pay applicable immediately prior to the date of transfer, and annual and sick leave balances shall be credited to leave accounts of such personnel in the Senate Restaurants.October 7, 1997October 1, 1997section 2044 of this title
notes: References in TextAppropriations under this heading, referred to in text, probably means appropriations under the headings “ARCHITECT OF THE CAPITOL”, “”, and “” in the annual Legislative Branch Appropriations Act.Capital Buildings and Groundssenate office buildings
